properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where would I run But to the throne of mercy Where would I kneel But at this cross of grace How great the love How strong the hand that holds us Beautiful, so beautiful

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So here, I bow, to lift You high Jesus, be glorified In all things, for all my life I am Yours, forever Yours

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a King Who bore the scars of healing There is a Son Who came in grace and truth How great the love That carries us to kindness Wonderful, You’re wonderful

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God here, and now, be lifted high Right here, and now, be glorified God of heaven and earth God who brought me back to life I am Yours, forever Yours

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So here, I bow, to lift You high Jesus, be glorified In all things, and for all my life I am Yours, forever Yours…
